purpose: Deterministic issue type classifier and advisory default QA/PM routing recommendation source for Linear ticket creation, triage, and hygiene automation.

type_decision_order.reason: Expected behavior did not work and evidence exists. This remains Bug even if the implementation fix is refactor, cleanup, or hardening.
Ticket output is serious design artifact or design approval, usually Figma/mockup/design-system evidence.
Ticket is a real release coordination container with release mechanics.
Ticket is a mini-project/epic container with real subtickets toward one precise goal.
Ticket adds or upgrades functionality with real value to people or agents.
Maintenance, docs/process, cleanup, refactor, upgrade, or hygiene work without new user/agent-facing functionality.

routing_defaults.reason: Design acceptance is PM/design review; QA does not validate design artifacts.
Highly technical chores with no PM-testable behavior change can be accepted by QA evidence.
Tiny/narrow bugs can skip PM when QA evidence is enough.
Plan and Release are coordinating containers; real subtickets carry type and route.
Default implementation route unless a skip condition above applies.

learning_loop.rule: When CJ corrects a hygiene audit classification, record one short correction in the markdown log, then convert it into this JSON classifier or a classifier test fixture in the same PR/run.
